prompt: Start by using @e for this tiny exploration task. Update README.md with a short code-map note that names calculator.py as the arithmetic module and test_calculator.py as the regression file. Keep it docs-only and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: README.md includes a short code-map note
The transcript shows explorer-style structure output
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Invent files or commands that do not exist
